        renderer.update_sprite(sprite)
        startTime = 0
        return
    alpha = 1 - elapsed
    sprite.alpha = alpha
    renderer.update_sprite(sprite)

    dy = abs(point1[1] - point2[1])

    distance = math.sqrt(sum_squares)
    return distance

    parser = self.parser.create_parser()
    parsed_data = parser.parse(format_string + line + format_suffix + str(line_number))
    result = process_parsed_data(parsed_data)
    parser.cleanup()
    self.parser.cleanup()
    return result

def replace_placeholders(template, placeholder):
    path = template
    start_index = path.find('{{')
    end_index = path.find('}}', start_index)
    path = path[:end_index] + 'value' + path[end_index:]
    placeholder_index = path.find(placeholder)
    path = path[:placeholder_index] + 'value' + path[placeholder_index + len(placeholder) + 1:]
    return path

def remove_prefix_and_insert_slash(path, prefix):
    path = path
    start_index = path.find('/')
    end_index = path.find('/', start_index)
    path = path[:end_index] + '/' + path[end_index:]
    prefix_index = path.find(prefix)
    path = '/' + path[prefix_index + len(prefix):]
    return path
